steps.title: Look for contrast between places
steps.content: The claim says the poem conveys McKay's contrasting feelings about New York City and Jamaica. The best quotation must show that tension rather than focusing on only one location.

steps.title: Choose the divided feeling
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D focus on New York City imagery. Choice C focuses on island imagery. The remaining quotation shows the speaker sadly watching dawn in New York while wishing to be on the island of the sea. The answer is B.
